title: Write-guard hook threads the acting session; bound hook-contract rows
action: Thread the acting session into the production write guard (the S2-deferred BL-1 item, per D3). hooks/bee-write-guard.mjs already has ctx.payload in scope at its guards.checkWrite call site: pass payload.session_id (when a non-empty string) as the sessionId argument fsh-5 added and fsh-7 taught the hold deny. Absent/empty session_id = the exact call shape used today (zero-difference for runtimes that do not send it). DENY CHANNEL (pinned, cold-pickup note): write-guard denials are stderr + exit 2 (see expectApplyPatchDenied in test_hook_contracts.mjs) — NOT a systemMessage; assert the holder+expiry text by substring-matching the deny format fsh-7 shipped in guards.mjs. FIXTURE PATTERN: the runLaneSessionRows block in test_hook_contracts.mjs (runWrapper + buildFixture + writeSessionFile/writeLaneFile) is the direct template for bound-session rows; a reservations.json fixture writer does not exist yet — author one mirroring writeSessionFile. Add bound-case rows: (a) a payload carrying session_id bound to a lane is gated by that lane's phase/gates (the S2-deferred bound rows); (b) a write into another session's active hold is denied through the REAL hook child with the holder+expiry message; (c) own-session hold and expired hold pass through; (d) every pre-existing zero-session row passes unmodified. RED-first. Vendor the byte-identical sibling under .bee/bin/hooks/ (enforced by the verify's cmp).

truths: Driven through the real hook child process, a cross-session hold write is denied (exit 2, stderr carries holder+expiry) in a swarming-phase execution-approved lane, and an own-session or expired hold is not
A payload with a lane-bound session_id is gated by that lane's phase and gates through the real hook
A CORRUPT .bee/reservations.json with a session-carrying payload yields exit 2 (deny) through the real hook — the fail-open outer catch does not swallow it into an allow (panel B1)
Every pre-existing hook-contract row passes unmodified (payloads without session_id behave byte-identically)

artifacts.substantive: payload.session_id threaded into checkWrite, absent = today's call shape

key_links: the hook passes sessionId into the same checkWrite signature fsh-5/fsh-7 shipped — no parallel guard path
prohibitions: No changes to bee-session-init.mjs (S4 owns it)
No changes to lib files (fsh-7 owns them)
No weakened or deleted existing assertion

verify: node skills/bee-hive/templates/tests/test_lib.mjs && node hooks/test_hook_contracts.mjs && node skills/bee-hive/scripts/test_onboard_bee.mjs && cmp -s hooks/bee-write-guard.mjs .bee/bin/hooks/bee-write-guard.mjs

trace.outcome: bee-write-guard.mjs threads payload.session_id into guards.checkWrite's optional sessionId option (absent/empty = null, byte-identical to today's 4-arg call). This wires fsh-7's lib-level hold deny and lane-bound gating through the REAL production hook: a cross-session hold write is denied (exit 2, stderr names holder session/agent/expiry) in a swarming-phase execution-approved lane; the acting session's own hold, an expired hold, and a legacy session-less row never block; a payload with a lane-bound session_id is gated by that lane's own phase/gates even when the default record is permissive; a present-but-corrupt reservations.json fails closed (exit 2) for a session-carrying payload rather than being swallowed by the hook's fail-open outer catch (C7); a payload with no session_id is zero-difference even with an active hold present (C8/C9 satisfied). Authored a reservations.json fixture writer (none existed) mirroring writeSessionFile/writeLaneFile. Vendored .bee/bin/hooks/bee-write-guard.mjs byte-identical (cmp exit 0).
trace.verify_output: test_lib.mjs: 264 passed, 0 failed. test_hook_contracts.mjs: 133 rows across 15 check groups (0 skipped), 0 failing target contract, ALL PASS (includes 8 new write-guard-hold rows: cross-session-hold-denied-in-swarming-lane, own-session-hold-never-blocks, expired-hold-never-blocks, legacy-session-less-row-never-blocks, no-session-id-uses-permissive-default-as-control, lane-bound-session-gated-by-its-own-lane, corrupt-reservation-store-fails-closed, no-session-id-is-zero-difference-even-with-a-hold). test_onboard_bee.mjs: PASS - failures 0, skipped 1. cmp -s on hooks/bee-write-guard.mjs vs .bee/bin/hooks/bee-write-guard.mjs: exit 0 (byte-identical vendored parity). Combined exit code 0.
trace.verify_command: node skills/bee-hive/templates/tests/test_lib.mjs && node hooks/test_hook_contracts.mjs && node skills/bee-hive/scripts/test_onboard_bee.mjs && cmp -s hooks/bee-write-guard.mjs .bee/bin/hooks/bee-write-guard.mjs
